system.description:
Time: Each attempt represents 1 week of effort at crafting the perfect epic saga.

An adventurer can inspire their fellows on a type of skill check, without needing to be proficient themself. One character tells an inspiring tale (either via roleplay or a die roll), focusing on the use of a particular skill highlighted in helping the hero of the story to win the day. The character makes a Performance, Insight, or Deception check to attempt to inspire their companions.

journeyProperties.criticalFailure: Any companions listening to the story only get confused. This undermines their confidence, and they subtract 1d4 from their next roll for the target skill.
journeyProperties.success: Any companions listening to the story add an expertise die to their next roll for the target skill.
journeyProperties.criticalSuccess: Any companions listening to the story gain advantage on their next roll for the target skill.
